# vtm_action (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

### Optional

- `email_from` (String)
- `email_server` (String)
- `email_to` (Set of String)
- `log_file` (String)
- `note` (String)
- `program_arguments` (Block Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--program_arguments))
- `program_program` (String)
- `soap_additional_data` (String)
- `soap_password` (String)
- `soap_proxy` (String)
- `soap_username` (String)
- `syslog_msg_len_limit` (Number)
- `syslog_sysloghost` (String)
- `timeout` (Number)
- `trap_auth_password` (String)
- `trap_community` (String)
- `trap_hash_algorithm` (String)
- `trap_priv_password` (String)
- `trap_traphost` (String)
- `trap_username` (String)
- `trap_version` (String)
- `verbose` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

### Nested Schema for `program_arguments`

- `name` (String)
